The '''''Emperor's Net''''' was an [[Immobilizer 418 Interdictor-class Heavy Cruiser|Immobilizer 418 cruiser]] that joined Warlord [[Zsinj]]. It later participated in the [[Battle of Kuat (Hunt for Zsinj)|Battle of Kuat]].

{{Ship-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Iron Fist]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Iron Fist (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
